During-Test

## Conduct Secure Proctored Assessments With AI-Powered Proctoring Technology

AI-powered technology designed to detect cheating and use of unfair means

Our AI-based technology raises flags in various instances of suspicious activities

![]()

AI-based-Flag

Auto proctoring is an AI-based automated proctoring technology that uses students' webcams and microphone feed to auto-invigilate.

![]()

Video-Proctoring

### Video proctoring

Checking students' video feed to raise flags in case of any suspicious activity.

![]()

Audio-Proctoring

### Audio proctoring

Checking students' audio feed to raise flags in case of additional human voices in the vicinity.

![]()

Image-Proctoring

### Image proctoring

Checking students' pictures taken at regular intervals.

[](/online-remote-proctoring/)

* * *

## Our Secure Browser Technology Makes Candidate Systems Safe to Conduct CBT Exams

![]()

* Online Exams Are **Launched in Lockdown Mode,** Using MSB Wherein **Additional Softwares/Hardwares Are Disabled**
 
* Test Takers Are Not Allowed To **Navigate Away From Test Window**
 
* However, Clients Can **Whitelist Applications And Softwares** As Per Their Requirements
 

[](/safe-and-secure-exam-browser/)

## We Work at Unmatched Scale to Deliver the Computer Based Assessments

Mercer | Mettl Achieves a New Milestone of 200,000 Proctored Assessments in a Single Day!

## We Achieved the Feat of Conducting 200,000 Proctored Assessments in A Day

The assessments were fully secure, using our state-of-the-art online proctoring solution. Additionally, they were conducted the world over in various languages to undertake different types of examinations.
